title: helianthus formosus
intro: Helianthus formosus, also known as the Formosa sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is native to Formosa (now known as Taiwan) and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Helianthus formosus is often prepared into teas, infusions, or salves, and is used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and fever to skin conditions and digestive issues.
